title: Bedwars Essentials
description: This project adds some useful PvP, performance, and quality-of-life mods that let you experience Bedwars in a smoother and more enjoyable way.
body:
# Bedwars Essentials

Bedwars Essentials is a modpack built to level up your Bedwars experience 
It brings together a hand-picked set of PvP, performance, and quality-of-life mods that help you play faster, smoother, and more consistent. Whether you're tryharding ranked or just playing for fun, this modpack has your back 💪

## ✨ What makes this modpack great?

🚀 Better Performance: Higher FPS and reduced lag for smoother gameplay.

👀 Clean HUD & Info Displays: See what matters — no clutter.

⚔️ PvP Enhancements: Smoother hits, cleaner movement, and a more responsive combat feel.

🎯 Only the Essentials: No bloat. Lightweight, efficient, and optimized.
